scenes.visual_prompt: 5 Stoic Lessons That Changed My Life
scenes.script_line: Marcus Aurelius ruled Rome for two decades.

scenes.visual_prompt: Marcus Aurelius sitting alone in a dimly lit Roman tent, writing in a leather journal by candlelight
scenes.script_line: His private journal became one of history's greatest philosophy books.

scenes.visual_prompt: sunrise over ancient Roman ruins columns
scenes.script_line: Lesson one. You have power over your mind, not outside events.
Realize this and you will find strength.

scenes.visual_prompt: A stoic philosopher standing calm amid a raging storm, dramatic lighting, bold illustration style
scenes.script_line: Lesson two. We suffer not from events, but from our judgment of them.

scenes.visual_prompt: ancient Roman marble bust sculpture dramatic lighting
scenes.script_line: Lesson three. The obstacle is the way.

scenes.visual_prompt: person meditating on mountain peak at golden hour
scenes.script_line: Every challenge is a chance to practice virtue.

scenes.visual_prompt: A glowing journal surrounded by golden light, with Marcus Aurelius quotes floating around it
scenes.script_line: Start practicing today. Your life will never be the same.
